headline: Why Analysts Are Growing More Confident In Lam Research (LRCX)
summary: With an upside potential of 21.56%, Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is among the 10 Tech Stocks That Could Make You a Millionaire. On April 23, B. headline: Jim Cramer Notes NVIDIA’s Status as Largest Company While Praising New Tech Chips
summary: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar as he highlighted AI winners to buy for 2026. Cramer noted that the company provides chips that are necessary for data centers and said: You need the chips, too.
